column1: # :Display Options Grid Yes/No — toggle worksheet gridlines. Real
# R3.4a draws magenta dotted lines in the inter-glyph pixels, which a
# TUI cannot reproduce; our best-effort approximation paints a dim `·`
# at each cell's rightmost column whenever that position would
# otherwise be a space. Pixel-level behavior is covered by
# :DOGY enables gridlines and returns to READY without a beep.
